what_changed: Aligned project policy to system-level handoff migration and governance precedence.
Enabled Stage A dual-write handoff workflow (`*.handoff.json` + `handoff.txt`).
Added context hygiene rules for Gemini CLI via .geminiignore.

risks.description: Legacy sessions may continue to update handoff.txt only until workflow is fully adopted.

next_3_actions: Adopt JSON-first handoff path for all new control-tower cycles.
Validate handoff JSON in each cycle before status sync.
Review sunset timing for optional handoff.txt retirement.
